title: 'Fun dads' get 5 things right about parenting that many people forget—'they're worth borrowing' this Father's Day, says expert
summary_full: Many parents spend their days managing schedules, chores and responsibilities. This Father's Day, a parenting expert shares five "fun dad" habits that can increase joy and strengthen parent-child relationships.
summary_public: Many parents spend their days managing schedules, chores and responsibilities. This Father's Day, a parenting expert shares five "fun dad" habits that can increase joy and strengthen parent-child relationships.
